schema.name: TZPID source truth generated from canonical equation master

theory.canonical_statement: the "Vibrating Code." Source: [ID 1090] SYNAPTIC AVALANCHE EXPONENT Canonical Statutory Formula: $P (s) $ ∼ $s−τ , τcrit $ = $3/2⊗TZP $ Scaling Formal Technical Dissertation: Matches the power-law distribu-tion of reactor energy cascades to the critical exponent of biological synaptic avalanches $(τ $ = $3/2). $ This alignment facilitates "entrainment" of neural networks. Source: [ID 1091] ENTANGLED PARTICLE NEURAL INJECTION Canonical Statutory For-mula: $ρbio $ = $E(ρmed) =⇒ I(Mind;Reactor) > $ 0 Formal Technical Dissertation: Protocol for injecting entangled states into biological tissue. The DAANSphere axis provides a vector stimulus perceived as an internal coordinate shift, creating a shared reference frame. Source: [ID 1092] 153,600-DIMENSIONAL TRAJECTORY ENCODING Canonical Statutory Formula: $T (t) ∈ R153,600 $ ∼= $Hmemory $ Formal Technical Dissertation: Maps geo
theory.technical_interpretation: Definition of E(ρmed) is an inequality / bound, written E(ρmed) =⇒ I(Mind;Reactor) >. It states an inequality or bound that constrains the admissible range of the quantity. It is built from I, M, n, R, a, c, defining E(ρmed). Within the Trawin Zero Point registry it serves as one element of the framework's mathematical narrative.
